title: eleocharis kleinii
intro: Eleocharis kleinii, also known as dwarf spikesedge, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Eleocharis kleinii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
